# Issue #8745: Deploy Script Update
**Repository:** Project-MONAI/MONAI
**Author:** ericspod
**Status:** closed
**Created At:** 2026-02-21T23:53:18Z

## Description
### Description

This fixes the failing deploy script action by adding the --no-build-isolation option for pip.

### Types of changes
<!--- Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply, and remove the not applicable items -->
- [x] Non-breaking change (fix or new feature that would not break existing functionality).
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or new feature that would cause existing functionality to change).
- [ ] New tests added to cover the changes.
- [ ] Integration tests passed locally by running `./runtests.sh -f -u --net --coverage`.
- [ ] Quick tests passed locally by running `./runtests.sh --quick --unittests  --disttests`.
- [ ] In-line docstrings updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated, tested `make html` command in the `docs/` folder.

## Comments
### Comment by coderabbitai[bot] at 2026-02-21T23:53:32Z
<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: summarize by coderabbit.ai -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## Walkthrough

CI workflow updates for `.github/workflows/setupapp.yml`: Python test matrix shifted from versions 3.9-3.11 to 3.10-3.12. Caching consolidated from separate weekly-timestamp and pip/torch cache steps into a single inline pip cache directive. Dependency installation adds `--no-build-isolation` flag for requirements-dev.txt. Coverage reporting enabled by adding `--coverage` flag to both BUILD_MONAI test invocations.

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 2 (Simple) | ⏱️ ~15 minutes

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->
